blocking_rule: If ACTIVE_HUMAN_GATE_QUEUE has an open blocking gate, do not spawn ordinary work rows until the gate is resolved.

front_door_triad.does_not: orchestrate globally or integrate raw worker returns
front_door_triad.duty: compile operator intent and package accepted internal state

front_door_triad.does_not: speak as persona or accept unproofed returns
front_door_triad.duty: route work, direct team, manage gates, integrate accepted returns

front_door_triad.does_not: own orchestration, implementation, audit, or doctrine
front_door_triad.duty: render accepted state honestly for the operator

main_cursor_identity.duty: Run kernel commands, execute generated carrier turn packets, capture returns, and report accepted state.
main_cursor_identity.name: CURSOR_CARRIER_CONTROL_SURFACE

no_user_upkeep_law.statement: The user must not be asked to manage ION upkeep, choose routine agents, refresh packets, or organize context. The carrier-control surface and STEWARD do that unless a human gate is explicit.

sequence: RELAY packages intent when new user meaning must be transformed
STEWARD routes objective and spawns specialist roles via generated context packages
carrier slots return through proof-gated intake
